pageContext.name: Commander Stargazer
pageContext.description: He's been fighting crime in the Limbo Galaxy for over 300 years and there's no way Commander Stargazer is going to sit back and let Mon*Star and his cronies run amok on his watch!  This 7 scale highly-articulated SilverHawks ULTIMATES! figure of Commander Stargazer features detailed sculpting and includes interchangeable heads & hands as well as a variety of accessories suitable for a no-nonsense galactic lawman. This dedicated crime fighter is the force that keeps the SilverHawks on-task and hot on the heels of galactic criminals, and adding this made-to-order ULTIMATES! figure can keep your collection at its best.
